rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA GAIL WEAVER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Confirm Title Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2 (C)] And To Award Possession Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2(D)]
rulings.Rulings: continued to 12/18/17. new proofs of service were filed, but show less than the 30 days notice required by Probate Code section 851. at least 30 days notice of hearing must be given for the continued hearing date, and new POS filed. in addition, as Petitioner is a fiduciary appointed in the proceeding, the attorney cannot sign and verify the supplement. A supplement signed and verified by the Petitioner must be filed.
